data.title: Tether introduces self-custodial wallet for USDT, XAUT, USAT, and Bitcoin with cloud backup.
data.description: A new self-custodial app called tether.wallet has been launched by Tether. This app supports USDT, XAUT, USAT, and Bitcoin. It includes cloud-based key backup features for added security. This release marks Tether's latest expansion into providing services for digital assets beyond its flagship stablecoin USDT.

data.title: Playful Pooch Nearly Dies After Snacking on Castor Bean Seeds
data.description: In preparation for your spring garden, ensure to watch out for potentially harmful choices. In recent news from Minneapolis on April 14, 2026, it was highlighted that River, a Dutch Shepherd, uses chewing on objects like a castor bean pod to grab her family's attention. It is important to be cautious as castor beans contain ricin, a highly toxic substance, with just one raw seed being enough to cause serious harm. Therefore, it is crucial to be mindful of the flora you have in your garden to avoid such dangers.

data.title: Nucleus Research Releases 2026 iPaaS Technology Value Matrix
data.description: Key players in the iPaaS industry are companies like Boomi, Infor, Oracle, Salesforce (Informatica), and Tray.ai. Recent data from MIAMI dated April 14, 2026 stated that the expansion of enterprise application portfolios is leading to a rise in integration activities for organizations. This growth is intensifying the volume and complexity of integration tasks that companies are required to handle.

data.title: Planet Oat Oatmilk Sparks "The Great Coffee Debate," Challenging Fans to Choose: Team Hot Coffee or Team Iced Coffee
data.description: A pop-up event in NYC and a nationwide sweepstake are inviting coffee enthusiasts to pick a side and taste the distinction. Planet Oat, the leading oatmilk brand in the U.S., is sparking debate with their new campaign. The event, happening in Lynnfield, Mass on April 14, 2026, aims to differentiate coffee preferences and encourage consumers to participate in the sweepstake. With various prizes up for grabs, this initiative celebrates the diversity in coffee tastes and the popularity of oatmilk, highlighting the brand's prominent position in the market.

data.title: Modern Healthcare Names Southern California Permanente Medical Group's Khang Nguyen, MD, to its 2026 Innovators Awards List
data.description: Dr. Khang Nguyen, the Chief Medical Officer at Care Navigation within The Permanente Federation, has been acknowledged for his efforts in leveraging technology to improve care access and streamline communication. The recognition was received in Oakland, California on April 14, 2026. Dr. Nguyen, who also serves as the medical director for Care Transformation, has been instrumental in implementing innovative tools to enhance healthcare services.

data.title: Accelerate into the Agentic GRC Era at LogicGate's Agility 2026 Conference
data.description: Be part of an event in Chicago on April 14, 2026, where leaders in compliance, risk management, and cybersecurity can explore Agentic AI innovation, enhance their skills on the LogicGate platform, and earn CPE credits. LogicGate, a top AI GRC Platform for enterprises, will be hosting the event.

data.title: Loews Corporation to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) has announced that it will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Monday, May 4, 2026. The company will also provide earnings remarks on its website on the same day. The remarks are expected to feature commentary from the Company's Chief Executive.
